<!-- indicator: fig-wc-impact-hlthinsur-access -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-wc-impact-hlthinsur-access
#| fig-cap: 'The Impact of Health Insurance Coverage & Access to Care in Westchester County (n = 35)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing The Impact of Health Insurance Coverage & Access to Care in Westchester County (n = 35).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-wc-impact-hlthinsur-access", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
